stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, at what times and on what frequency should outbound aircraft contact GLASGOW TOWER?

>>> EGPF GLASGOW <<< SCHEDULE: MON-SAT 0700-2000 MOBILE CRANE OPR PSN 555434N 0042609W GLASGOW, MAX HGT 177FT AGL,197FT AMSL APRX. JIB WILL BE LOWERED IN LVP. SITE CONTACT STEFAN ERBES 07841 254052.: NOTAM EG/A0555/16 SCHEDULE: 0001-0500 GLASGOW RADAR AND TOWER MAY BE PROVIDED AS A COMBINED FUNCTION WITH COUPLED FREQUENCIES. INBOUND AND OVERFLYING AIRCRAFT SHOULD CONTACT GLASGOW RADAR ON 119.1 MHZ. OUTBOUND AIRCRAFT SHOULD CONTACT GLASGOW TOWER ON 118.8 MHZ.: NOTAM EG/A0313/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.a: From 07:00 to 20:00 on the frequency 119.1 MHz.
options.b: From 05:00 to 00:01 on the frequency 118.8 MHz.
options.c: From 07:00 to 20:00 on the published frequency.
options.d: From 00:01 to 05:00 on the frequency 118.8 MHz.
